Hero.heading1: We systemize and automate your businesses efficiently,
Hero.heading2: custom-built and fully managed for you.
Hero.subtext: We audit your business, organize your operations and implement AI automations to reduce manual work and help your work effectively.

ApproachIntro.description: We follow a structured four-phase methodology that starts with a deep business audit and ends with fully automated, measurable systems that run without you having to micromanage every process.

Phases.phase01Desc: We start by deeply analyzing your current operations, identifying bottlenecks, redundant processes, and untapped opportunities. You get a clear roadmap of what to fix and in what order.
Phases.phase02Desc: We design and implement the core operational systems your business needs: project management, CRMs, reporting dashboards, and communication frameworks that give you full visibility and control.
Phases.phase03Desc: We layer intelligent automations on top of your systems using tools like n8n and custom AI models. Repetitive tasks are eliminated. Your team focuses on high-value work.
Phases.phase04Desc: We don't just build and leave. We train your team, document every process with clear SOPs, and set up metrics so you can track performance and continue improving after we're done.

CaseStudies.heading: Client work and results
CaseStudies.case1Headline: Hours of Reporting Reduced to Minutes with Custom API Workflows
CaseStudies.case1Did1: Designed custom APIs and automated workflows to replace manual Excel-based reporting
CaseStudies.case1Did2: Eliminated repetitive chart creation, distribution, and review cycles
CaseStudies.case1Did3: Freed up staff time to focus on higher-value strategic tasks
CaseStudies.case1Quote: Our teams were spending hours every day creating, sending, and reviewing Excel charts for internal logistics. Anhmake built custom APIs and workflows that eliminated all of that — now our people focus on work that actually moves the needle.
CaseStudies.case2Headline: Real-Time Production Visibility, Zero Manual Reporting
CaseStudies.case2Did1: Automated capture of frequently changing production floor data into a central database
CaseStudies.case2Did2: Eliminated manual data collection, consolidation, and report generation
CaseStudies.case2Did3: Built real-time dashboards for instant production status visibility
CaseStudies.case2Quote: Our staff used to spend countless hours manually updating, compiling, and formatting production data into reports. Now everything flows into the database automatically and the entire team can see results on a live dashboard. Productivity has never been higher.
CaseStudies.case3Headline: From Hours of Manual Work to Minutes with Custom Scripts
CaseStudies.case3Did1: Analyzed existing design tool workflows for pamphlet and namecard production
CaseStudies.case3Did2: Built custom scripts tailored to their current software environment
CaseStudies.case3Did3: Reduced repetitive layout and formatting tasks from hours to minutes
CaseStudies.case3Quote: Creating ad pamphlets and namecards used to take us hours of tedious manual work. Anhmake designed scripts that plug right into the tools we already use — what took hours now takes just a few minutes. It's been a game-changer for our team.

Technology.heading: Technology we specialize in
Technology.subtext: We're tool-agnostic. We pick the right technology for your specific business context.

WhyUs.point1Body: We take the time to understand your business at a deep level before recommending any technology. We diagnose before we prescribe — which means you get solutions that actually fit.
WhyUs.point2Title: Knowing tools isn't the hard part. Understanding how a business actually runs — that is
WhyUs.point2Body: We build automation solutions on top of your existing tech stack. No unnecessary replacements, no over-engineering. Just practical implementations that get results without adding complexity or cost.
WhyUs.point3Title: We don't just use AI. We build it
WhyUs.point3Body: While most automation agencies stop at prompt engineering and off-the-shelf AI tools, we have hands-on experience building custom AI systems — designed around your specific workflows, data, and business logic.
WhyUs.point4Title: Tech agnostic — we pick what's right for you
WhyUs.point4Body: We have no vendor quotas or preferred tools to push. We evaluate your specific needs and select the best technology for your situation, not the one that pays us the highest referral fee.

Outcomes.heading1: We find constraints, then solve them for

FinalCTA.subtitle: Reach Operational Excellence
FinalCTA.heading: You're a few systems away from doubling your profit margins.

Comments.title: Client Comments
Comments.review1Quote: Our teams were spending hours every day creating, sending, and reviewing Excel charts for internal logistics. Anhmake built custom APIs and workflows that eliminated all of that — now our people focus on work that actually moves the needle.
Comments.review2Quote: Our staff used to spend countless hours manually updating, compiling, and formatting production data into reports. Now everything flows into the database automatically and the entire team can see results on a live dashboard. Productivity has never been higher.
Comments.review3Quote: Creating ad pamphlets and namecards used to take us hours of tedious manual work. Anhmake designed scripts that plug right into the tools we already use — what took hours now takes just a few minutes. It's been a game-changer for our team.

Team.heading: Meet the team that designs every process from headquarters to the factory floor

Values.heading: Core values and beliefs
Values.quote1Text: Treat every client's problem as my own. If I'm not satisfied with the result, the client won't be either.
Values.quote2Text: 1. Question every requirement. 2. Delete any part or process you can. 3. Simplify and optimize. 4. Accelerate cycle time. 5. Automate. In that order — never start with automation.

Footer.tagline: We audit your business and implement AI automations to reduce manual work and scale efficiently.

AIMetadata.title: AI and Automation | Anhmake
AIMetadata.description: We analyze your business for opportunities to install AI and automations that slash your costs, scale processes and revenue. 100% done-for-you agency.

AIMetadata.title: We build efficient processes first, then selectively apply AI | Anhmake
AIMetadata.description: We don't hope AI will figure it out. We design stable, repeatable processes first and apply AI only where it adds real value.

AIAutomation.heroDesc:
We don't hope AI will figure it out. We design stable, repeatable processes
first and apply AI only where it adds real value.
AIAutomation.statsDesc: Hours of <highlight>manual</highlight> work replaced with automation for our clients
AIAutomation.howDesc:
We look deep inside your business and find where manual, habit-driven processes
can be redesigned and replaced with automation-first workflows.
AIAutomation.step1Desc: We visually map your current systems, tasks, and data flows.
AIAutomation.step2Title: We find where AI and automation fit
AIAutomation.step2Desc: We review your workflows and pinpoint the highest-impact opportunities.
AIAutomation.step3Desc: We combine custom scripts, AI tools, n8n, and your existing tech stack to build it out.
AIAutomation.step4Desc: Once your processes run on automation, every AI advancement opens new opportunities to optimize further.
AIAutomation.useCasesTitle: Endless use cases for AI and Automation
AIAutomation.useCasesDesc: Our clients make their teams 10X more efficient by taking tedious, repetitive work off their plate. Industry agnostic.
AIAutomation.useCase1Desc: HQ-to-factory data sync, real-time status checks, production data entry, and more.
AIAutomation.useCase2Desc: Prompt engineering, auto-responses, and intelligent agents for customer service, sales, chatbots, and marketing.
AIAutomation.useCase3Desc: We connect every manual, repetitive step from task handoff to completion — onboarding, admin, accounting, invoicing.
AIAutomation.useCase4Desc: Automate the most tedious daily tasks to free up your team's time. We've even replaced entire teams of virtual assistants.
AIAutomation.useCase5Desc: Automate data entry, collection, cleansing, and reporting from scattered sources for fast, accurate decision-making.
AIAutomation.useCase6Desc: Connect your apps to each other for instant data handoffs and consolidated information across your stack.
AIAutomation.techTitle: Our AI and Automation tech stack
AIAutomation.techDesc: We've built complete processes with every one of these tools — and there are countless more we have experience with or can integrate.
AIAutomation.tech1Desc: The company behind ChatGPT and other leading AI models. We constantly test their latest innovations.
AIAutomation.tech2Desc: Anthropic's frontier AI model — one of the most capable and safety-focused assistants we use to build intelligent automation workflows.
AIAutomation.tech3Desc: Google's flagship AI project and a direct competitor to ChatGPT.
AIAutomation.tech4Desc: A powerful open-source workflow automation tool we use to build complex, scalable automations fully tailored to your business.
AIAutomation.tech5Desc: We use Python and JavaScript for custom scripting in more complex workflows.
AIAutomation.appsDesc: Plus thousands more apps through APIs, custom code, and webhooks.
AIAutomation.whyTitle: Why AI must be combined with Automation
AIAutomation.why1Title: You can't automate everything without AI
AIAutomation.why1Desc: AI supercharges automation by enabling data analysis, predictions, decision-making, and content creation.
AIAutomation.why2Title: AI isn't useful in every scenario
AIAutomation.why2Desc: AI is a pattern-prediction model, so its outputs aren't always consistent. That's why it needs to be placed within a validated workflow by someone who knows the process.
AIAutomation.why3Desc: ChatGPT needs manual prompts and editing. We automate the steps before and after it so the whole chain runs hands-free.
AIAutomation.why4Title: Manual commands need people and skill
AIAutomation.why4Desc: People create bottlenecks and make errors, causing delays in handoffs and inconsistent quality.

N8nMetadata.title: n8n Automation | Anhmake
N8nMetadata.description: The only n8n consultants who guarantee success. Expert n8n consulting, custom development, multi-AI agent workflows, self-hosting support, training, maintenance, bug fixes.

N8nAutomation.heroDesc: Expert n8n consulting, custom development, multi-AI agent workflows, self-hosting support, training, maintenance, bug fixes. We combine elite developers with business process consultants to build automations that solve big problems and drive real results.
N8nAutomation.approachTitle: Our proven approach to n8n projects
N8nAutomation.approachDesc: We're the only n8n agency who combines elite developers with business process consultants, so we only build automations that solve big problems and drive real results at scale without breaking.
N8nAutomation.phase1Desc: We document your operations, analyze your technology and interview your team to suggest the best approach to hit your goals with n8n. The end result is a clear automation plan with opportunities, process maps and expected outcomes.
N8nAutomation.phase2Desc: Fully done-for-you n8n development beginning with a proof of concept. We provide custom code, AI training, data standardization, integrations and automated workflows—with guaranteed on-time completion.
N8nAutomation.phase3Desc: Before launch, we run multiple cycles of testing and iteration until everything is accurate and quality. When we go live, we monitor your automations closely to ensure successful implementation.
N8nAutomation.phase4Desc: We guarantee adoption because we win buy-in from employees upfront, simplify procedures and train your team. Then, we set-up a dashboard with your most important metrics and proactively manage your automations.
N8nAutomation.whyTitle: How we outperform other n8n agencies.
N8nAutomation.why1: We take a consultative approach so you don't miss out on hidden opportunities or fumble implementation—which drives measurable results.
N8nAutomation.why2: We specialize in the entire technology stack: CRMs, Project Management, AI, Automation, etc.
N8nAutomation.why3: We are extremely credible and competent. Our team is composed of world-class AI, automation, sales and project management leaders. We're so confident in our work, we guarantee success in our contracts.
N8nAutomation.why4: We are tech agnostic, meaning we are not married to any tools, allowing us to be flexible to your operations and only recommend what's best for you.
N8nAutomation.faq1Q: What is an n8n consulting agency?
N8nAutomation.faq1A: An n8n consulting agency is a provider of n8n development services. They build end-to-end automations primarily using n8n. Their services can include: business process consulting, AI agent projects, low-code automation, LLM training, integrations, on-premise self-hosting for near-zero costs, maintenance.
N8nAutomation.faq2Q: Why use n8n instead of alternatives?
N8nAutomation.faq2A: n8n is the most developer-friendly and lowest cost platform amongst top alternatives like Zapier and Make. It's an open-source, self-hostable workflow automation platform that gives you full control over your data, logic, and infrastructure. It's more flexible than tools like Zapier, supports custom code and complex workflows, and can scale cost-effectively.
N8nAutomation.faq3Q: How much does custom n8n development cost?
N8nAutomation.faq3A: Costs depend on workflow complexity, integrations, and hosting setup. High end n8n developers charge $200–$400/hr. Project-based: Simple automations $1,000–$2,000 · Mid-level projects $5,000–$20,000 · Enterprise solutions $40,000+. Self-hosting can lower long-term costs significantly.
N8nAutomation.faq4Q: What are the best use cases for n8n?
N8nAutomation.faq4A: n8n shines for multi-step cross-platform workflows such as: company-wide AI assistants, data syncs and ETL pipelines, recurring AI-powered workflows (CRM, marketing, fulfillment, scoring), reporting and alerts, and custom AI agents.
N8nAutomation.faq5Q: How do you approach automation work with clients?
N8nAutomation.faq5A: We use a proven 4-phase approach: (1) Process Audit — deep understanding of constraints, data and processes. (2) n8n Buildout — proof of concept then rapid iteration. (3) Launch and Iterate — 10-day free iteration period post-launch. (4) Maintenance — developer on standby to monitor, fix and update automations.
